advice.irrigation: Keep the soil moist but not flooded. Maintain 2-3 cm water level.
advice.fertilizer: Basal application of NPK (40:20:20 kg/ha equivalent).
advice.protection: Treat seeds with Carbendazim (2g/kg) before sowing.
advice.tips: Ensure 1/10th of the main field area for the nursery.

advice.irrigation: Maintain a standing water level of 2-5 cm.
advice.fertilizer: Apply Nitrogen (Urea) in splits. First top-dress now.
advice.protection: Keep field weed-free for the first 30 days.
advice.tips: Plant 2-3 seedlings per hill at a shallow depth.

advice.irrigation: Critical stage! Maintain 5 cm water. Avoid drying.
advice.fertilizer: Apply second split of Nitrogen (Urea) with Potash.
advice.protection: Monitor for Leaf Folder and Yellow Stem Borer.
advice.tips: Hand weeding or use post-emergence herbicides.

advice.irrigation: Drain water 15 days before harvest.
advice.fertilizer: Final Nitrogen top-dress at panicle initiation.
advice.protection: Watch for Brown Plant Hopper and Blast disease.
advice.tips: Harvest when 80% of grains reach a straw color.

advice.irrigation: First irrigation at 21 days (Crown Root Initiation stage).
advice.fertilizer: 120:60:40 NPK kg/ha. Basal dose of P and K.
advice.protection: Watch for termites in early stages.
advice.tips: Sow in lines with a 22.5 cm distance.

advice.irrigation: Regular intervals (15-20 days) based on soil moisture.
advice.fertilizer: First top-dress of Nitrogen after the first irrigation.
advice.protection: Spray for broad-leaved weeds like Phalaris minor.
advice.tips: Ensure second irrigation at the late tillering stage.

advice.irrigation: Crucial: Flowering and Milk stages require moisture.
advice.fertilizer: Last Nitrogen application before heading.
advice.protection: Monitor for Yellow Rust (stripes on leaves).
advice.tips: Harvest when grains produce a metallic sound when bitten.

advice.irrigation: Light irrigation for uniform germination.
advice.fertilizer: Basal NPK application. High requirement of Potash.
advice.protection: Control sucking pests like Jassids and Aphids.
advice.tips: Gap filling to maintain the desired plant population.

advice.irrigation: Increase frequency during the flowering stage.
advice.fertilizer: Top-dress Nitrogen at the start of flowering.
advice.protection: Watch for Bollworms (American and Pink).
advice.tips: Use Pheromone traps to monitor bollworm activity.

advice.irrigation: Reduce frequency to allow boll opening.
advice.fertilizer: None required at this stage.
advice.protection: Clean picking to avoid dry leaf mix.
advice.tips: Sun-dry the picked cotton to reduce moisture.

advice.irrigation: Maintain soil moisture for healthy seedlings.
advice.fertilizer: Application of Zinc Sulphate (25 kg/ha) is vital.
advice.protection: Prevent soil-borne diseases with seed treatment.
advice.tips: Thinning at 10-15 days to manage plant density.

advice.irrigation: Water stress at silking can reduce yield by 50%.
advice.fertilizer: Top-dress Nitrogen at the knee-high stage.
advice.protection: Control stem borer with granular insecticides.
advice.tips: Apply Nitrogen when leaves are dry to avoid burns.

advice.irrigation: Stop irrigation a week before harvesting.
advice.fertilizer: No additional fertilizer needed.
advice.protection: Watch for cob borer and bird damage.
advice.tips: Harvest when husks turn dry/straw color.

advice.irrigation: Pre-sowing irrigation is helpful for pulses.
advice.fertilizer: Use rhizobium culture for nitrogen fixation.
advice.protection: Seed treatment for wilt and root rot.
advice.tips: Ensure proper drainage in the field.

advice.irrigation: Irrigate at the flowering and pod development stages.
advice.fertilizer: Application of DAP (100 kg/ha) at sowing.
advice.protection: Control pod borer (Helicoverpa armigera).
advice.tips: Nipping of gram at 40 days to increase branching.

advice.irrigation: Frequent light irrigation at 10-day intervals.
advice.fertilizer: 250 kg N/ha. Basal dose of P and K.
advice.protection: Control Early Shoot Borer with soil treatment.
advice.tips: Use healthy 3-budded setts for planting.

advice.irrigation: Highest water demand. Irrigate weekly in summer.
advice.fertilizer: Final Nitrogen dose should be done by the 6th month.
advice.protection: Watch for Pyrilla and Whitefly.
advice.tips: Earthing up to prevent lodging and pests.

advice.irrigation: Increase irrigation interval to 20 days.
advice.fertilizer: None. Nitrogen reduces juice quality now.
advice.protection: Protect against rats and wild boars.
advice.tips: Test maturity with a Brix refractometer.

advice.irrigation: Light irrigation if rains fail.
advice.fertilizer: High requirement of Gypsum (500 kg/ha).
advice.protection: Control Ticka leaf spot and leaf miner.
advice.tips: Application of Gypsum during the flowering stage.

advice.irrigation: Avoid water stress at the pegging stage.
advice.fertilizer: No Nitrogen after flowering.
advice.protection: Monitor for root rot and white grub.
advice.tips: Harvest when shells develop internal dark markings.

advice.irrigation: Frequent light irrigation for uniform tubers.
advice.fertilizer: 150:100:100 NPK kg/ha. Full P and K basal.
advice.protection: Watch for Late Blight (brown spots).
advice.tips: Earthing up when plants are 15-20 cm high.

advice.irrigation: Critical for tuber expansion. Maintain moisture.
advice.fertilizer: Apply Nitrogen in splits.
advice.protection: Stop irrigation 10 days before de-haulming.
advice.tips: De-haulming 10-15 days before harvest to harden skin.

advice.irrigation: First irrigation at 25-30 days.
advice.fertilizer: 60:40:40 kg NPK/ha. Basal application.
advice.protection: Control weeds at the 35-day stage.
advice.tips: Barley is more salt-tolerant than wheat.

advice.irrigation: Ensure moisture at flowering and grain formation.
advice.fertilizer: None required.
advice.protection: Monitor for barley rust and smut.
advice.tips: Harvest at 18-20% grain moisture.

advice.irrigation: Moderate. Avoid waterlogging at all costs.
advice.fertilizer: High organic manure (FYM) requirement.
advice.protection: Treat rhizomes with Mancozeb (0.3%).
advice.tips: Mulching is key for heat and moisture control.

advice.irrigation: Regular intervals for development.
advice.fertilizer: Potash is vital for rhizome size.
advice.protection: Watch for soft rot and leaf spot.
advice.tips: Harvest when leaves stay yellow and dry.

advice.irrigation: Regular drip irrigation for canopy.
advice.fertilizer: Balance of N, P, K and Micronutrients.
advice.protection: Powdery Mildew control is critical.
advice.tips: Proper training and pruning for yield.

advice.irrigation: Uniform moisture to avoid berry cracking.
advice.fertilizer: High Potash for sugar accumulation.
advice.protection: Monitor for Downy Mildew.
advice.tips: Girdling at berry set for size.
